user.title: Smart Actions
user.description: Set up the Smart Actions integration to manage contextual quick actions on your dashboard.

add_action.title: Add Smart Action
add_action.description: Create a new smart action. Conditions and service calls can be configured in YAML or via the smart_actions.add_action service.

data.name: Display Name
data.users: Allowed users (comma-separated person entity IDs, empty = all)
data.conditions: Condition of whether to show this smart action on the dashboard

data_description.tap_action_type: Action to run when the action is clicked on the dashboard. Configure the appropriate section below for the action you choose.

tap_action_service.name: "Call a service" section
tap_action_service.description: Configure this section if you selected "Call a service" above

data.tap_action_service: Choose the service to run when the smart action is tapped.

data_description.tap_action_service: Note, this can only be configured for one service. Any additional services will be ignored.

tap_action_navigate.name: "Navigate" section
tap_action_navigate.description: Configure this section if you selected "Navigate" above

data.tap_action_navigation_path: Choose the path to navigate to when the smart action is tapped.

tap_action_entity.name: "More info" section
tap_action_entity.description: Configure this section if you selected "More info" above

data.tap_action_entity: Choose the entity to show when the smart action is tapped.

tap_action_url.name: "Open URL" section
tap_action_url.description: Configure this section if you selected "Open URL" above

data.tap_action_entity: Choose the URL to open when the smart action is tapped.
